section.heading: United States compliance with its nuclear nonproliferation treaty obligations

content.p: Nothing in this chapter constitutes authority for any action in violation of an obligation of the United States under the NPT.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of Pub. L. 109–401, Dec. 18, 2006, 120 Stat. 2726, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 8001 of this title and Tables.
